name: @pryzm/site-validators
description: A.7.d (Phase A · Sprint 2) — L2 pure-geometry validators for the C19 Site substrate.  Point-in-polygon, polygon area (shoelace), polygon offset (setback shrinkage), footprint containment, FAR compliance, polygon-immutability canonical fingerprint.  Zero I/O, no THREE, no DOM, no @pryzm/* runtime deps; only depends on `Pt` from @pryzm/schemas.  Re-usable by L3 site-commands (containment check before site.setFootprint commit), L4 renderer (setback-violation visualisation), L5 Site Inspector UI, L7 plugin authors.
